summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of zero-based budgeting app. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases passed covering init/seed, dashboard shape, income allocation, cash & credit expense flows, validation errors, expense deletion reversal, negative projection flag, card payoff aggregation, account update persistence, and reset. Frontend: dashboard renders 4 accounts + 3 cards, Income modal saves and updates balances, Credit Expense modal (method=credit, card=amex, payoff=general) creates expense and updates owed_to_cards/projected_balance/card breakdown correctly, negative-alert appears when projected < 0, Settings tab updates target and persists. All core flows working end-to-end.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Cosmetic only — do not block functionality on web.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate deprecated 'shadow*' style props to 'boxShadow' and 'props.pointerEvents' to 'style.pointerEvents' in theme.ts / component styles to silence RN-web warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 420-line file — acceptable for current scope; if more endpoints are added consider splitting into routers (accounts/cards/incomes/expenses/dashboard).

POST /api/cards/payoff deletes the underlying credit expenses after settlement. This is intentional per the spec ('balances are clean') but means historical credit expenses are not retained for reporting. Confirm desired behavior with product.
No auth — matches single-user local app spec.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection {'_id':0} everywhere.
seed_data_creation: Used /api/reset before tests to start clean; tests create TEST_-prefixed records and reset at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 16 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_budget_api.py are reusable as regression. Frontend testIDs are well-covered: dashboard-scroll, account-card-{key}, card-summary-{key}, card-detail-{key}, quick-add-income, quick-add-expense, save-income, save-expense, alloc-{key}, exp-amount, exp-description, method-{cash|credit}, card-{amex|mc|visa}, payoff-{key}, source-{key}, settings-scroll, target-input-{key}, save-target-{key}, balance-input-{key}, save-balance-{key}, reset-all, negative-alert. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://budget-zero-app.preview.emergentagent.com.
